name: painel-senha-ni
description: Painel de senha do Ni — Sistema de Gerenciamento de Senhas

scripts.build:totem: electron-builder --win --x64 --config.nsis.include=build/installer-totem.nsh --config.productName="Painel de senha do Ni - Totem" --config.artifactName="Painel de senha do Ni - Totem Setup.exe"
scripts.build:painel: electron-builder --win --x64 --config.nsis.include=build/installer-painel.nsh --config.productName="Painel de senha do Ni - Telao" --config.artifactName="Painel de senha do Ni - Telao Setup.exe"
scripts.build:admin: electron-builder --win --x64 --config.nsis.include=build/installer-admin.nsh --config.productName="Painel de senha do Ni - Admin" --config.artifactName="Painel de senha do Ni - Admin Setup.exe"
scripts.build:dual: electron-builder --win --x64 --config.nsis.include=build/installer-dual.nsh --config.productName="Painel de senha do Ni - Dual Monitor" --config.artifactName="Painel de senha do Ni - Dual Monitor Setup.exe"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:totem && npm run build:painel && npm run build:admin && npm run build:dual
